occurrence_sentence: IonQ has raised substantial funding from venture capital firms like Cambium, a multi-stage venture capital firm focused on investments in the future of computational paradigms, Tao Capital Partners and Correlation Ventures, among others.

interaction_phrase: raised substantial funding from venture capital firms like Cambium
occurrence_sentence: IonQ has raised substantial funding from venture capital firms like [Cambium, a multi-stage venture capital firm focused on investments in the future of computational paradigms](https://thequantuminsider.com/2020/06/17/ionq-secures-new-funding-raising-total-to-84-million-adds-advisory-board-members/), [Tao Capital Partners and Correlation Ventures](https://thequantuminsider.com/2019/10/24/ionq-secures-55-million-in-latest-funding-round/), among others.
